documentation.file_docstring: Find index where query matches at a word boundary in text. Returns null if no match.
inline_comments: Fuzzy match with pre-lowercased inputs (avoids toLowerCase on every keystroke). Returns score (lower = better) or null if no match.
Filter items using pre-lowercased searchTextLower field. Supports space-separated tokens (all must match).
Prepare items for fuzzy filtering by pre-computing lowercase search text.
